label: In toroidal or cylindrical geometry, rotation mitigates but does not eliminate kink at finite pressure

provenance.source_span: Ideal stability of cylindrical plasma in the presence of mass flow A. Bondeson, and R. Iacono Citation: Physics of Fluids B: Plasma Physics 1, 1431 (1989); View online: https://doi.org/10.1063/1.858973 View Table of Contents: http://aip.scitation.org/toc/pfb/1/7 Published by the American Institute of Physics Articles you may be interested in Importance o

strengths: Strong historical comparator showing rotation can mitigate kink without eliminating it.
weaknesses: The studied geometries do not include the full Atlas H3 helical structure, so full-strength projection is too broad.
